{"action": "send", "to": "DocLead", "label": "DraftAnnouncement", "payload": "We are excited to announce the launch of our new AI Research Initiative, a strategic effort to advance cutting-edge research in artificial intelligence across our organization.

This initiative brings together cross-functional teams to explore emerging applications, develop novel approaches, and strengthen our position in AI innovation. Our researchers will focus on both foundational work and practical applications that deliver value to our business and customers.

Key highlights:
- Dedicated research teams launching immediately
- Focus on emerging AI techniques and applications
- Cross-functional collaboration across engineering and product
- Regular progress updates and demonstrations

All team members are encouraged to stay tuned for upcoming sessions and opportunities to participate in this important work."}
